properties.Test Case: Create a "custom-thumbnail-256.png" for a book and upload to Bloom Library. (Dimensions must be exactly 256x256 pixels.) When the book is harvested, the custom thumbnail should show up, rather than a portion of the cover image.
properties.Steps: Create a "custom-thumbnail-256.png" for a book and upload to Bloom Library. (Dimensions must be exactly 256x256 pixels.) When the book is harvested, the custom thumbnail should show up, rather than a portion of the cover image.

properties.Test Case: Try all the modes of PDF publishing for an A5 book.
properties.Steps: Try all the modes of PDF publishing for an A5 book.

properties.Test Case: Check correct PDF generation for each page layout (portrait & landscape), including page numbers. Ensure thumbnails are correct.
properties.Steps: Check correct PDF generation for each page layout (portrait & landscape), including page numbers. Ensure thumbnails are correct.

properties.Test Case: New Moon and Cap, change layout from A5Portrait to A5Landscape, Publish simple PDF
properties.Steps: New Moon and Cap, change layout from A5Portrait to A5Landscape, Publish simple PDF

properties.Test Case: Download one of Look, Listen and Live books. Publish simple PDF. Compare this PDF with the PDF on Blorg and ensure they are exactly the same. Pay close attention to margins. (Note that in order to get the font to match you may need to set your collection default font to Calibri)
